item.title: AAAAXY [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:title: AAAAXY [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:author: divverent
item.itunes:summary:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.
[read more]
item.description:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.
[read more]

item.title: Moto Widget [Virtualization]
item.itunes:title: Moto Widget [Virtualization]
item.itunes:author: meoify
item.itunes:summary:
Moto Widget
(Virtualization)
Moto Widget shows the time, weather, Google Fit data and more.
Moto Widget lets you see the date, time, weather and more at a glance. You can view the widget in Moto's iconic circle style or in plain text. The widget also lets you easily access a separate weather page where you can get more detailed information.

When you tap on the down arrow in the Beyond widget, you'll cycle through the date and time, weather, dual time and your steps recorded in Google Fit. Moto Widget lets you easily get the information you need right when you need it.

You can also choose to use the Classic battery ring widget or the Clean rectangle widget. To choose a widget:
1) Press and hold on a blank space on the Home screen
2) Tap on "Widgets"
3) Scroll down to "Moto Widget"
4) Drag and drop a widget to your Home screen

Try it out today!
Compatible with android 8.0+

Channel: @meoify
Discussion: @meoifydiscussion

My YouTube : https://youtube.com/channel/UCHqdpfbTJENnYdQ-OfyK5WQ
[read more]
item.description:
Moto Widget
(Virtualization)
Moto Widget shows the time, weather, Google Fit data and more.
Moto Widget lets you see the date, time, weather and more at a glance. You can view the widget in Moto's iconic circle style or in plain text. The widget also lets you easily access a separate weather page where you can get more detailed information.

When you tap on the down arrow in the Beyond widget, you'll cycle through the date and time, weather, dual time and your steps recorded in Google Fit. Moto Widget lets you easily get the information you need right when you need it.

You can also choose to use the Classic battery ring widget or the Clean rectangle widget. To choose a widget:
1) Press and hold on a blank space on the Home screen
2) Tap on "Widgets"
3) Scroll down to "Moto Widget"
4) Drag and drop a widget to your Home screen

Try it out today!
Compatible with android 8.0+

Channel: @meoify
Discussion: @meoifydiscussion

My YouTube : https://youtube.com/channel/UCHqdpfbTJENnYdQ-OfyK5WQ
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Moto Widget
(Virtualization)
Moto Widget shows the time, weather, Google Fit data and more.
Moto Widget lets you see the date, time, weather and more at a glance. You can view the widget in Moto's iconic circle style or in plain text. The widget also lets you easily access a separate weather page where you can get more detailed information.

When you tap on the down arrow in the Beyond widget, you'll cycle through the date and time, weather, dual time and your steps recorded in Google Fit. Moto Widget lets you easily get the information you need right when you need it.

You can also choose to use the Classic battery ring widget or the Clean rectangle widget. To choose a widget:
1) Press and hold on a blank space on the Home screen
2) Tap on "Widgets"
3) Scroll down to "Moto Widget"
4) Drag and drop a widget to your Home screen

Try it out today!
Compatible with android 8.0+

Channel: @meoify
Discussion: @meoifydiscussion

My YouTube : https://youtube.com/channel/UCHqdpfbTJENnYdQ-OfyK5WQ
[read more]

item.title: Kdenlive [Video Editors]
item.itunes:title: Kdenlive [Video Editors]
item.itunes:author: zrch-garcia-96
item.itunes:summary:
Kdenlive
(Video Editors)
Kdenlive is a free and open-source video editing software based on the MLT Framework, KDE and Qt. The project was started by Jason Wood in 2002, and is now maintained by a small team of developers. With the release of Kdenlive 15.04.0 in 2015 it became part of the official KDE Projects suite. Kdenlive packages are freely available for Linux, FreeBSD, and Microsoft Windows.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.description:
Kdenlive
(Video Editors)
Kdenlive is a free and open-source video editing software based on the MLT Framework, KDE and Qt. The project was started by Jason Wood in 2002, and is now maintained by a small team of developers. With the release of Kdenlive 15.04.0 in 2015 it became part of the official KDE Projects suite. Kdenlive packages are freely available for Linux, FreeBSD, and Microsoft Windows.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Kdenlive
(Video Editors)
Kdenlive is a free and open-source video editing software based on the MLT Framework, KDE and Qt. The project was started by Jason Wood in 2002, and is now maintained by a small team of developers. With the release of Kdenlive 15.04.0 in 2015 it became part of the official KDE Projects suite. Kdenlive packages are freely available for Linux, FreeBSD, and Microsoft Windows.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]

item.title: SuperTux [Arcade]
item.itunes:title: SuperTux [Arcade]
item.itunes:author: zrch-garcia-96
item.itunes:summary:
SuperTux
(Arcade)
SuperTux is a free and open-source two-dimensional platform video game published under the GNU General Public License. The game was inspired by Nintendo's Super Mario Bros. series; instead of Mario, the hero in the game is Tux, the official mascot of the Linux kernel.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.description:
SuperTux
(Arcade)
SuperTux is a free and open-source two-dimensional platform video game published under the GNU General Public License. The game was inspired by Nintendo's Super Mario Bros. series; instead of Mario, the hero in the game is Tux, the official mascot of the Linux kernel.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
SuperTux
(Arcade)
SuperTux is a free and open-source two-dimensional platform video game published under the GNU General Public License. The game was inspired by Nintendo's Super Mario Bros. series; instead of Mario, the hero in the game is Tux, the official mascot of the Linux kernel.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]

item.title: Logseq [Notes]
item.itunes:title: Logseq [Notes]
item.itunes:author: zrch-garcia-96
item.itunes:summary:
Logseq
(Notes)
Logseq Sync BETA Always up-to-date notes between all your devices. With encrypted file syncing, you'll always have your notes backed up and securely available in real-time on any device. Whiteboards BETA A new canvas for your thoughts.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.description:
Logseq
(Notes)
Logseq Sync BETA Always up-to-date notes between all your devices. With encrypted file syncing, you'll always have your notes backed up and securely available in real-time on any device. Whiteboards BETA A new canvas for your thoughts.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Logseq
(Notes)
Logseq Sync BETA Always up-to-date notes between all your devices. With encrypted file syncing, you'll always have your notes backed up and securely available in real-time on any device. Whiteboards BETA A new canvas for your thoughts.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]

item.title: Heroic Games Launcher [Various Games]
item.itunes:title: Heroic Games Launcher [Various Games]
item.itunes:author: zrch-garcia-96
item.itunes:summary:
Heroic Games Launcher
(Various Games)
Heroic Games Launcher. Heroic is an Open Source Game Launcher for Linux, Windows and macOS. Right now it supports launching games from the Epic Games Store using Legendary, GOG Games using our custom implementation with gogdl and Amazon Games using Nile..
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.description:
Heroic Games Launcher
(Various Games)
Heroic Games Launcher. Heroic is an Open Source Game Launcher for Linux, Windows and macOS. Right now it supports launching games from the Epic Games Store using Legendary, GOG Games using our custom implementation with gogdl and Amazon Games using Nile..
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Heroic Games Launcher
(Various Games)
Heroic Games Launcher. Heroic is an Open Source Game Launcher for Linux, Windows and macOS. Right now it supports launching games from the Epic Games Store using Legendary, GOG Games using our custom implementation with gogdl and Amazon Games using Nile..
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]

item.title: Storyboarder [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:title: Storyboarder [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:author: zrch-garcia-96
item.itunes:summary:
Storyboarder
(Graphic Apps)
Storyboarder, at the highest level, is a drawing organizer. It makes drawing and ordering drawings simpler. You could do this with a stack of paper and a pencil. Anyone who makes broad claims otherwise is a liar.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.description:
Storyboarder
(Graphic Apps)
Storyboarder, at the highest level, is a drawing organizer. It makes drawing and ordering drawings simpler. You could do this with a stack of paper and a pencil. Anyone who makes broad claims otherwise is a liar.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Storyboarder
(Graphic Apps)
Storyboarder, at the highest level, is a drawing organizer. It makes drawing and ordering drawings simpler. You could do this with a stack of paper and a pencil. Anyone who makes broad claims otherwise is a liar.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]

item.title: Standar Notes [Notes]
item.itunes:title: Standar Notes [Notes]
item.itunes:author: zrch-garcia-96
item.itunes:summary:
Standar Notes
(Notes)
Standard Notes is a secure digital notebook that protects your notes and files with 4x-audited, industry-leading end-to-end encryption, meaning only you have access to the keys required to decrypt your information.
This is the latest version (3.181.24 - Relased on 2023)
[read more]
item.description:
Standar Notes
(Notes)
Standard Notes is a secure digital notebook that protects your notes and files with 4x-audited, industry-leading end-to-end encryption, meaning only you have access to the keys required to decrypt your information.
This is the latest version (3.181.24 - Relased on 2023)
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Standar Notes
(Notes)
Standard Notes is a secure digital notebook that protects your notes and files with 4x-audited, industry-leading end-to-end encryption, meaning only you have access to the keys required to decrypt your information.
This is the latest version (3.181.24 - Relased on 2023)
[read more]

item.title: Inkscape [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:title: Inkscape [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:author: zrch-garcia-96
item.itunes:summary:
Inkscape
(Graphic Apps)
nkscape is a free and open-source vector graphics editor for GNU/Linux, Windows and macOS. It offers a rich set of features and is widely used for both artistic and technical illustrations such as cartoons, clip art, logos, typography, diagramming and flowcharting. It uses vector graphics to allow for sharp printouts and renderings at unlimited resolution and is not bound to a fixed number of pixels like raster graphics. Inkscape uses the standardized Scalable Vector Graphics file format as its main format, which is supported by many other applications including web browsers. It can import and export various other file formats, including SVG, AI, EPS, PDF, PS and PNG. Inkscape can render primitive vector shapes and text. These objects may be filled with solid colors, patterns, radial or linear color gradients and their borders may be stroked, both with adjustable transparency.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.description:
Inkscape
(Graphic Apps)
nkscape is a free and open-source vector graphics editor for GNU/Linux, Windows and macOS. It offers a rich set of features and is widely used for both artistic and technical illustrations such as cartoons, clip art, logos, typography, diagramming and flowcharting. It uses vector graphics to allow for sharp printouts and renderings at unlimited resolution and is not bound to a fixed number of pixels like raster graphics. Inkscape uses the standardized Scalable Vector Graphics file format as its main format, which is supported by many other applications including web browsers. It can import and export various other file formats, including SVG, AI, EPS, PDF, PS and PNG. Inkscape can render primitive vector shapes and text. These objects may be filled with solid colors, patterns, radial or linear color gradients and their borders may be stroked, both with adjustable transparency.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Inkscape
(Graphic Apps)
nkscape is a free and open-source vector graphics editor for GNU/Linux, Windows and macOS. It offers a rich set of features and is widely used for both artistic and technical illustrations such as cartoons, clip art, logos, typography, diagramming and flowcharting. It uses vector graphics to allow for sharp printouts and renderings at unlimited resolution and is not bound to a fixed number of pixels like raster graphics. Inkscape uses the standardized Scalable Vector Graphics file format as its main format, which is supported by many other applications including web browsers. It can import and export various other file formats, including SVG, AI, EPS, PDF, PS and PNG. Inkscape can render primitive vector shapes and text. These objects may be filled with solid colors, patterns, radial or linear color gradients and their borders may be stroked, both with adjustable transparency.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]

[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h3][b] FIND MORE PROJECT FROM ☞ [/h3] [/b] [url=https://www.pling.com/u/revwhiteshadow] @revWhiteShadow [/url]
[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]

GS DNS Injector, developed by @revWhiteShadow, is a versatile and powerful module designed to enhance your DNS (Domain Name System) configuration. By utilizing this tool, you can effortlessly switch between various DNS servers such as OpenDNS, Google DNS, Norton DNS, Ads Blocker DNS, and Cloudflare DNS.

The GS DNS Injector empowers users to modify their DNS settings easily, providing an efficient means to enhance their internet browsing experience. By choosing different DNS servers, users can potentially optimize their network performance, improve security, and gain access to advanced features provided by these DNS providers.

This module also includes an ads blocker DNS feature, which can help reduce unwanted advertisements during web browsing sessions, enhancing overall user experience. By leveraging this functionality, users can enjoy a cleaner and more streamlined browsing environment.

Whether you seek improved speed, enhanced security, or targeted ad blocking capabilities, the GS DNS Injector developed by @revWhiteShadow is a valuable tool for DNS management, allowing you to effortlessly switch between popular DNS servers and customize your internet experience.
[read more]

GS DNS Injector, developed by @revWhiteShadow, is a versatile and powerful module designed to enhance your DNS (Domain Name System) configuration. By utilizing this tool, you can effortlessly switch between various DNS servers such as OpenDNS, Google DNS, Norton DNS, Ads Blocker DNS, and Cloudflare DNS.

The GS DNS Injector empowers users to modify their DNS settings easily, providing an efficient means to enhance their internet browsing experience. By choosing different DNS servers, users can potentially optimize their network performance, improve security, and gain access to advanced features provided by these DNS providers.

This module also includes an ads blocker DNS feature, which can help reduce unwanted advertisements during web browsing sessions, enhancing overall user experience. By leveraging this functionality, users can enjoy a cleaner and more streamlined browsing environment.

Whether you seek improved speed, enhanced security, or targeted ad blocking capabilities, the GS DNS Injector developed by @revWhiteShadow is a valuable tool for DNS management, allowing you to effortlessly switch between popular DNS servers and customize your internet experience.
